name: /plugin-install records the plugin id and the source github org-slash-repo in the local plugin registry for traceability
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example && printf 'name: example
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt && [ -s .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml ] && grep -q 'plugin_id: example' .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && grep -q 'source_repo: acme/example' .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
